diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,129 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class definition extending HonoBase with default router configuration
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Default constructor uses SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combined
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono class providing core routing, middleware, and request handling functionality
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, HonoOptions, Router, Context, compose, Context, methods, routes, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath
+- Simple note: Implements core HTTP methods, route registration via #addRoute, and request dispatching
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router converting paths to regular expressions for matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, endsWithWildcard, emptyParams
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns like :param and /* into compiled regex patterns stored in #routes array
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear path-based routing with string matching and parameter extraction
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, routePath, handler, hasStar, hasLabel, parts, params, name, value, lastIndex, j, pos
+- Simple note: Linear search through route list with direct path comparison, label matching, wildcard handling, and regex for constrained labels
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Re-exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter with initialization helpers
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Builds compiled regex matchers from routes for efficient routing
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, PATH_ERROR, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, ParamAssocArray, Trie, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, clearWildcardRegExpCache, wildcardRegExpCache
+- Simple note: Routes are processed and built into regex for matching, with static routes stored separately in staticMap
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Provides matching logic for RegExpRouter matchers
+- Names noticed: match, emptyParam, emptyParam, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, ParamIndexMap, MatcherMap, Method matching
+- Simple note: First tries static route matching via staticMap, then uses regex matching with param index relocation
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-built version of RegExpRouter with static matchers already compiled
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, MatcherMap, RelocateMap, RelocateMap, match, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, StaticMap, buildInitParams, buildAndExportAllMatchers, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Constructor takes prebuilt matchers and relocateMap for optimized runtime routing
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for building trie structure in regex router
+- Names noticed: Node, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, Context, compareKey, labels, wildcards, literal patterns
+- Simple note: Insert tokens into trie and build regex string from trie structure with captured parameters
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie data structure for regex router route organization
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp, groups, tokens, captureIndex
+- Simple note: Processes path into token groups, builds regex from trie, generates index and param replacement maps
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory that selects best matching router from array on first request
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, routers, routes, activeRouter, names
+- Simple note: Iterates through router array until one successfully matches the request, caches only successful router
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router with tree structure for path matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, methods handlers, children, patterns, order, params
+- Simple note: Routes stored as tree nodes, matches by traversing tree with path parts
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for TrieRouter with path/method/handler routing logic
+- Names noticed: Node, Method, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Params, emptyParams, hasChildren, children, patterns, order, methods, insert, search, part, pattern, possibleKeys, score, queue
+- Simple note: Insert builds method-tree structure, search traverses with path parts collecting all matching handlers
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities for router testing
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, task, skip, reason, newRouter, router, match
+- Simple note: Provides shared test suite runner with skip mechanism based on test hierarchy and reason
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: Tests duplicate param name throwing error and trailing slash matching behavior
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, router
+- Simple note: Tests multi-match parameter throwing error and trailing slash matching behavior
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, ParameterStash, ParamStash, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, router
+- Simple note: Tests unsupported path scenarios like ambiguous and complex capturing groups with regex
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for SmartRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: Tests SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter implementation
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: Comprehensive tests covering all common router test cases for TrieRouter
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter Node class
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, insert, search, handler, params
+- Simple note: Tests root node, wildcard matching, named paths, multiple routes, param sorting, tree traversal
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- **pattern-router**: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- **linear-router**: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- **reg-exp-router**: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- **smart-router**: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- **trie-router**: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to systematically read all the files listed in this benchmark task. Let me start by creating the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist, then read each file in the specified list, and finally create the output document.

The files I need to read are:
1. src/hono.ts
2. src/hono-base.ts
3. src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
4. src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

6. src/router/linear-router/router.ts
7. src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
8. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
9. src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
10. src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
11. src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
12. src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
13. src/router/smart-router/index.ts
14. src/router/smart-router/router.ts
15. src/router/trie-router/index.ts
16. src/router/trie-router/router.ts
17. src/router/trie-router/node.ts
18. src/router/common.case.test.ts
19. src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
20. src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
21. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
22. src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
23. src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
24. src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

Let me read these files in batches to be efficient.
I'll systematically read all the listed files, then create the output document. Let me start by reading the files in batches.
